capability_assertions.positive: persistGraphProof has dispatchGraphProof as its direct caller.
capability_assertions.negative: deadAlphaGraphProof has no inbound CALLS, IMPORTS, or REFERENCES edges.

capability_assertions.positive: persistGraphProof has a depth-aware caller chain through dispatchGraphProof, entrypointGraphProof, and main.

Only the intentionally unused fixture functions are returned as dead-code candidates.
